hooks.command: [ -n "$CLAUDE_DOCS_HOOK" ] && exit 0; SID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); T="$HOME/.claude/projects/-Users-ryanhermes-Desktop-BIZTECH-Wearable/${SID}.jsonl"; [ -n "$SID" ] && [ -f "$T" ] && CLAUDE_DOCS_HOOK=1 claude -p "Read the transcript at '$T' then update CLAUDE.md at '/Users/ryanhermes/Desktop/BIZTECH/Wearable/CLAUDE.md': add any confirmed hardware constraints, wiring notes, phase progress, or other non-obvious project facts from this session. Make minimal accurate additions only, do not remove existing content." --allowedTools Read,Edit /Users/ryanhermes/Desktop/BIZTECH/Wearable 2>/dev/null || true
